testimonials.quote: Do not be afraid of making a mistake. But make sure you don't make the same mistake twice.
testimonials.author: Akio Morita

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.supportBlurb: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our
faqs.a1: Our customer service team is available Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 8:00 PM EST, and weekends from 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST. During holidays, hours may vary and will be posted on our website.
faqs.a2: Subscription payments are automatically charged to your default payment method on the same day each month or year, depending on your billing cycle. You can update your payment information and view billing history in your account dashboard.
faqs.a3: Yes, we offer several expedited shipping options at checkout. Next-day and 2-day shipping are available for most U.S. addresses if orders are placed before 2:00 PM EST. International expedited shipping options vary by destination.
faqs.a4: We offer multilingual support in English, Spanish, French, German, and Japanese. Our support team can assist customers in these languages via email, chat, and phone during standard business hours for each respective region.
faqs.q5: How do I track my order?
faqs.a5: Once your order ships, you'll receive a confirmation email with a tracking number. You can use this number on our website or the carrier's website to track your package. You can also view order status and tracking information in your account dashboard under "Order History".

policy.title: Cookie Policy
policy.description: Information about cookies used on this site and how to manage your preferences.
policy.pageIntro: This page explains what cookies we use and how you can change your preferences.
policy.essentialDesc: These cookies are necessary for the site to function. They cannot be disabled.
policy.essentialAuth: Authentication (Supabase) — Session data to keep you logged in. Duration: session.
policy.essentialConsent: Consent preference — Stores your cookie choice (localStorage). Duration: until you clear it.
policy.analyticsDesc: We use Firebase Analytics to understand how visitors use the site. These cookies are only set if you choose "Accept all".
policy.analyticsList: _ga, _gid — Firebase/Google Analytics. Helps us measure page views and usage. Duration: up to 2 years.
policy.changeDesc: You can change your cookie preferences at any time. Click the button below to reset your choice and see the consent banner again on the next page load.

banner.body: We use analytics to improve the site. Essential cookies are always on.

1.title: Senior Software Engineer
1.description: Leading development of scalable web applications using React, TypeScript, and Node.js. Mentoring developers and implementing best practices.

2.title: Full Stack Developer
2.description: Built and maintained client websites and e-commerce platforms. Collaborated with design teams on pixel-perfect UI/UX.

3.title: Frontend Developer
3.description: Developed responsive web applications using modern JavaScript frameworks. Optimized performance and accessibility.

4.title: Junior Developer
4.description: Assisted in building web applications and learning modern development practices. Contributed to team projects.

certificates.heading: Certificates
certificates.emptyDescription: Certificates you add from the dashboard will appear here.

hero.title: Ivan Bondaruk
hero.subtitle: Computer science teacher with a passion for robotics. I focus on web development and IoT, with solid experience building mobile apps when the project needs it.

intro.heading: History
intro.p1: I teach computer science and mentor students in robotics—bridging software, hardware, and real-world problem solving. This site is a living portfolio of that work.
intro.p2: Most of my hands-on development is on the web and connected devices (IoT). I ship mobile experiences when the product calls for native or cross-platform apps.
intro.badgeTeachingDesc: Classroom instruction and curriculum for CS fundamentals and computational thinking.
intro.badgeRoboticsDesc: Hands-on robotics, competitions, and project-based learning with hardware.
intro.badgeWebDesc: Modern web stacks, React, Next.js, and full-stack delivery.
intro.badgeIoTDesc: Sensors, embedded workflows, and connected product experiences.
intro.badgeMobileDesc: Native and cross-platform apps when products need mobile surfaces.
intro.badgeAIDesc: LLMs, tooling, and practical AI integration in products and teaching workflows.

timeline.heading: Life & milestones
timeline.subheading: On this page, milestones and detailed events are ordered by start date (oldest to newest). You control copy per language in the dashboard; order on the site follows the timeline, not the dashboard drag order.

timeline.depthSelectDetail: Select an event on the left to read the full story.
